import subprocess, os, time
api_key = "203d3536d58ed3b96952427308c11bd2"
url = f"https://civitai.com/api/download/models/3086841?token={api_key}"
out_dir = "/opt/ComfyUI/models/unet"
out_file = os.path.join(out_dir, "Krea2RedMix2.1-8Steps-fp8-scaled-ComfyUI.safetensors")
log_file = "/tmp/redmix_download.log"

# Test download first - just get headers to see if authorized
import urllib.request
req = urllib.request.Request(url, method='HEAD')
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) as r:
        content_length = r.headers.get('Content-Length', '0')
        content_type = r.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
        return f"OK! Size={int(content_length)/1024/1024/1024:.2f} GB, Type={content_type}"
except Exception as e:
    return f"FAILED: {e}"
